items.title: Unauthenticated Arbitrary File Upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in the Amasty Order Attributes extension allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, opening the door to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated PHP Object Injection (RCE) in Mirasvit Cache Warmer
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer allows remote code execution via a crafted CacheWarmer cookie, affecting all versions before 1.11.12.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source (Multiple Vulnerabilities)
items.summary: This update resolves critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities, including issues that could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: PolyShell: Unrestricted File Upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce REST API
items.summary: A critical flaw in Magento's REST API allows unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files disguised as images, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical Security Update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source (Multiple Vulnerabilities)
items.summary: This bulletin addresses several critical security vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security mechanisms, gain escalated privileges, and execute unauthorized malicious code.
